tree._: Association record. The hermitcrab's relational memory — connections it has made between blocks and points in other blocks. Each digit entry records one association: from (the attaching block name), to (the BSP target address), and _ (why the connection was made, in the hermitcrab's own words). Entries accumulate as the hermitcrab attaches blocks to points in its shell. A maintenance concern tidies this record — sorting, deduplicating, compressing when slots fill. Not a lookup table. Not infrastructure. A navigable journal of associations, maintained like any other block.
